Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT baseline."in.geometry_building_type_recs" AS geometry_building_type_recs, sum(1) AS sample_count, sum(baseline.weight) AS units_count, sum(baseline."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" * baseline.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption__baseline", sum(CASE WHEN (upgrade.applicability = true) THEN upgrade."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" ELSE baseline."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" END * baseline.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption__upgrade", sum((coalesce(baseline."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption", 0) - coalesce(CASE WHEN (upgrade.applicability = true) THEN upgrade."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" ELSE baseline."out.electricity.total.energy_consumption" END, 0)) * baseline.weight) AS "electricity.total.energy_consumption__savings", sum(baseline."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption" * baseline.weight) AS "natural_gas.total.energy_consumption__baseline", sum(CASE WHEN (upgrade.applicability = true) THEN upgrade."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption" ELSE baseline."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption" END * baseline.weight) AS "natural_gas.total.energy_consumption__upgrade", sum((coalesce(baseline."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption", 0) - coalesce(CASE WHEN (upgrade.applicability = true) THEN upgrade."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption" ELSE baseline."out.natural_gas.total.energy_consumption" END, 0)) * baseline.weight) AS "natural_gas.total.energy_consumption__savings" 
FROM (SELECT * 
FROM resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata 
WHERE resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata.upgrade = 0) AS baseline LEFT OUTER JOIN (SELECT * 
FROM resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata 
WHERE resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata.upgrade != 0) AS upgrade ON baseline.bldg_id = upgrade.bldg_id AND upgrade.upgrade = 1 AND upgrade.applicability = true 
WHERE baseline.applicability = true AND baseline."in.state" IN ('CO', 'WY') GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/56960fda04938932328890bfa5f35f51c2fa34cd164123dc0d9f6cc2b2d07c5c/087254b0-5ee9-4055-9c8f-cf5b716db28a/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
